properties.displayName: Deploy MySQL flexible server parameter audit_log_events to CONNECTION
properties.description: Set audit_log_events to include CONNECTION on MySQL flexible Servers
nonComplianceMessages: MySQL database flexible server configuration does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: MySQL parameter audit_log_events must include CONNECTION. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
